description: Baseline recorded: /msp/settings partial ~31.85MB/237 modules + package breakdown; sla/notifications sub-route partials recorded

Tier 2 (clients/user-comp/users/teams): zero bare /actions barrel imports remain at the 21 listed sites; aliases and import type preserved; typecheck exit 0
User management smoke: user list loads with avatars, add user, edit user (roles, password change), org chart renders; team list/add/edit with avatars
Tier 2 (tenancy/refdata/misc): zero bare barrel imports at the listed sites; 'verify'-flagged symbols (tenant logo/client fns, role fns) resolved to correct defining files; typecheck exit 0

Tenancy/general smoke: general settings load+save (tenant name, timezone), language settings, client portal settings (branding, locales, portal domain status), experimental features, secrets CRUD, interaction types/statuses CRUD incl reference-data import dialog
Tier 3: grep confirms no bare @alga-psa/*/actions or /components barrels remain in the swept packages/*/src/components/settings subtrees; typecheck exit 0
Tier 3 canary: settings manifest drops further; per-package trace recorded; non-productive narrowings noted rather than forced
Sub-routes: settings/sla and settings/notifications pages render and their partials shrink; zero barrels in those page files
ESLint: the three new globs report 0 no-restricted-imports violations; a probe file with a bare barrel import in the settings tree IS flagged (negative test), then removed
Final: full typecheck exit 0; full canary with target met or residual documented; SCRATCHPAD results filled; OQ1 decision note present if applicable

Full settings smoke matrix: every tab (General, Ticketing, Billing, Projects, Time Entry, Integrations, Email, Notifications, Secrets, Import/Export, Extensions, MCP) renders without console/provider errors
